result.stdout:
Description:
  A simple application for generating .ico files from SVGs

Usage:
  IconBuilder <icon> [options]

Arguments:
  <icon>  The output .ico file to write the icon to

Options:
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information
  --version             Show version information
  -i, --svg (REQUIRED)  The SVG file to convert to an icon
